title: Architectury & Carpentry
description: Build like never before! This mod elevates Minecraft with a massive collection of building blocks, including brand new decoratable pillars, walls, and more!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fb773288c3cdf3097373288c0641b1b88b43653.png)

Unlock endless creative possibilities with a stunning array of new block variants and customizations! Elevate your builds with versatile, dynamic elements that seamlessly connect and transform. Experience innovative blocks that bring your imagination to life, and enjoy regular updates that keep your building adventures fresh and exciting. Transform your world like never before!

![Builds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4377eaf0b7c88beebc46aac439b03939ceabd681.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2lOVTvulJEQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# New Blocks
Lot of new block variants such as Mossy Chiseled Stone Bricks, Cobbled Andesite, Cobbled Granite, Cobbled Diorite, and much more!

![Blocks](https://s10.gifyu.com/images/SfG5U.gif)

Also new blocks like Pillars and Thin Walls, that has lot of variants, and decoration types, that can be customized using Chisel and Hammer.

## Pillar
Pillar can be used in lot of cases. And it has ability to be customized by right clicking with chisel or hammer.

![Pillar](https://s10.gifyu.com/images/SfG53.gif)

It also conducts redstone up, so you can place on it Redstone Lamp, Fire Brazier or anything you want, and it can be controled by powering the lowest pillar block it is on.

![Redstone](https://s12.gifyu.com/images/SfGAm.gif)

## Thin Wall
Thin wall is block that connects together, and to other full blocks. Can be customized by right cliking with chisel or hammer.

Chisel will change it's decoration type on top, and hammer can "Extend" clicked face to perfectly fit into grid.

![Decoration](https://s12.gifyu.com/images/SfGAg.gif)![Extending](https://s10.gifyu.com/images/SfGAa.gif)

## Fire Brazier
Fire Brazier is decorative block that can be connected with Redstone.

It contains fire, that can be turned on and off by Flint and Steel and Showel, or by Redstone

![Fire Brazier](https://s10.gifyu.com/images/SfGAD.gif)

### Warning! Since this mod contains complicated models it can affect length of loading. We recommend you to use some performance mod! (or you can just wait until it loads)

# Roadmap
## More blocks
- More variants
- Arch
- Railing
- Stairs
- Floor
- Miniblock
- Stone heads
- Statues
- Belfry
- Window
- Big flower pot
- Chiseled iron bars
- Water jet

## Features
- Print variant when changed
- Show next variant
- Advacements
- Remake vanilla structures
- Villager profession
- Hand application reipe for moss, cracking with hand and chiseling with hand

## Items
- Cobble of stone/andesite/granite/diorite

## Updates
- Wooden update
- Nether Update
- End update
- Archeology update
